languages.text: {n}Арджента впивается взглядом в судно, словно перед ней враг из плоти и крови.{/n} "Противник желает посеять сомнение в каждом нашем шаге? Тогда пойдем без колебаний — как и подобает верным Ему!"

traits.locale_text: [драфт] {n}Арджента впивается взглядом в судно, словно перед ней враг из плоти и крови.{/n} "Противник желает поселить сомнение в каждом нашем шаге? Тогда пойдем без колебаний — как и подобает верным Ему!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"
languages.original_text: {n}Арджента впивается взглядом в судно, словно перед ней враг из плоти и крови.{/n} "Противник желает посеять сомнение в каждом нашем шаге? Тогда пойдем без колебаний — как и подобает верным Ему!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

{n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta regarde le vaisseau comme si elle faisait face à un xénos en chair et en os.{/n} « L'ennemi cherche-t-il à semer le doute dans nos esprits à chacun de nos pas ? Si c'est le cas, allons-y sans hésiter, comme il sied aux fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta regarde le vaisseau comme si elle faisait face à un xénos en chair et en os.{/n} « L'ennemi cherche-t-il à semer le doute dans nos esprits à chacun de nos pas ? Si c'est le cas, allons-y sans hésiter, comme il sied aux fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur ! »

languages.text: {n}Argenta observa fijamente la aeronave como si fuese un enemigo de carne y hueso plantado frente a ella.{/n} «¿Es que el enemigo pretende sembrar la duda en cada paso del camino? ¡Pues adelante sin titubear, como corresponde a Sus fieles!».
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta observa fijamente la aeronave como si fuese un enemigo de carne y hueso plantado frente a ella.{/n} «¿Es que el enemigo pretende sembrar la duda en cada paso del camino? ¡Pues adelante sin titubear, como corresponde a Sus fieles!».

languages.text: {n}阿洁塔紧盯着这艘飞行器，如同面对一个活生生的敌人。{/n}“敌人是想让我们每走一步都心存疑虑吗？那我们更应该毅然前行——这才不愧为祂的忠仆！”
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

traits.locale_text: {n}阿洁塔紧盯着这艘飞行器，如同面对一个活生生的敌人。{/n}“敌人是想让我们每走一步都心存疑虑吗？那我们更应该毅然前行——这才不愧为祂的忠仆！”

languages.text: {n}Argenta starrt das Schiff an wie einen Feind aus Fleisch und Blut, der vor ihr steht.{/n} "Will der Feind bei jedem unserer Schritte Zweifel säen? Dann lasst uns ohne Zögern weitergehen – wie es Seinen Gläubigen geziemt!"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta starrt das Schiff an wie einen Feind aus Fleisch und Blut, der vor ihr steht.{/n} "Will der Feind bei jedem unserer Schritte Zweifel säen? Dann lasst uns ohne Zögern weitergehen – wie es Seinen Gläubigen geziemt!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta, sanki karşısında etten kemikten bir düşman duruyormuş gibi araca bakıyor.{/n} "Düşman her adımımızda şüphe tohumları mı ekmeye çalışıyor? O hâlde tereddüt etmeden gidelim. O'nun sadık kullarına yakışır şekilde ilerleyelim!"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta, sanki karşısında etten kemikten bir düşman duruyormuş gibi araca bakıyor.{/n} "Düşman her adımımızda şüphe tohumları mı ekmeye çalışıyor? O hâlde tereddüt etmeden gidelim. O'nun sadık kullarına yakışır şekilde ilerleyelim!"

languages.text: {n}アルジェンタは敵の船をまるで目の前にいる敵のように見つめた。{/n}「敵は我々のあらゆる行動に疑いを植え付けようとしているのか。ならば躊躇なく進もう。彼の忠実なる者としてふさわしい行動だ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"
